summary: Iteration 14 - Comprehensive Full-Platform Test Complete. All 41 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified: Landing page (hero, stats, charts, browse loans with 56 products across 10 categories, chatbot, location picker, talk to us, footer), Auth flows (register, login, logout, OTP login, forgot password), Onboarding (4-step flow with URL param auto-select, Indian comma formatting), Dashboard (recommendations with approval reasons, leads, credit builder, AI advisor, EMI calculator), Admin dashboard (analytics, charts, leads table). Mobile responsiveness verified at 390px. Scroll reveal animations working.

minor.issue: Returns fallback message due to LLM budget exceeded (MOCKED)

issues: Console warning: chart width/height -1 when container not visible - cosmetic only, charts render correctly when visible

passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint returns 200
Backend: GET /api/loans/products returns 56 products
Backend: All 10 loan type filters work correctly (personal:13, home:10, car:6, bike:3, education:3, gold:5, used_vehicle:4, plot:4, mutual_funds:4, refinance:4)
Backend: GET /api/loans/stats returns stats with categories and top_banks
Backend: POST /api/auth/register creates new user with HTTP-only cookies
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials returns user data
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: 5 failed login attempts don't trigger 429 (brute force threshold is 10)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login-otp-request returns debug_otp in dev mode
Backend: POST /api/auth/forgot-password returns debug_otp in dev mode
Backend: POST /api/auth/logout clears cookies
Backend: GET /api/auth/me without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /api/auth/me with auth returns user data
Backend: PUT /api/user/profile creates/updates profile with onboarding_complete
Backend: GET /api/loans/recommendations without profile returns 400
Backend: GET /api/loans/recommendations with profile returns recommendations with approval_reasons
Backend: Approval probability varies between banks (public sector banks get boost)
Backend: POST /api/leads creates lead (Express Interest)
Backend: GET /api/leads returns user's leads
Backend: GET /api/credit-builder/suggestions returns suggestions
Backend: POST /api/analytics/event works with and without auth
Backend: GET /api/admin/analytics requires admin role (403 for regular users)
Backend: GET /api/admin/analytics returns analytics data for admin
Backend: GET /api/admin/events returns events for admin
Backend: POST /api/ai/chat-public returns response (fallback due to budget)
Backend: GET /api/credit-score/check returns unavailable with provider links (MOCKED)
Frontend: Landing page loads with hero section and correct image
Frontend: Stats bar shows 35+ banks, 10 categories, 100% control, 0 spam
Frontend: India loan stats section shows 2.8L+ daily applications
Frontend: Our Story section with founder LinkedIn link (shubhamkr0108)
Frontend: EMI Calculator section present and functional
Frontend: CTA section present
Frontend: Market Insights section with 3 charts (donut, horizontal bar, vertical bar)
Frontend: Browse Loans section with All (56) category pill
Frontend: All 10 category filter pills render with correct counts
Frontend: Clicking category pill filters cards correctly
Frontend: Loan cards show bank logo, interest rate, max amount, tenure, processing fee, features
Frontend: Talk to Us toggle opens panel with email (support@rinkosh.com), LinkedIn, phone placeholder
Frontend: Footer has 4-column layout with brand, contact, quick links, copyright © 2026
Frontend: Dark mode toggle works
Frontend: Register new user → login → logout → re-login all work
Frontend: OTP login request works (shows debug_otp in dev mode)
Frontend: Forgot password link present
Frontend: URL param ?loan_type=car auto-selects and skips to step 2
Frontend: Selecting loan type on step 1 auto-advances to step 2
Frontend: Back button on step 1 shows 'Back to Home'
Frontend: Amount fields use Indian comma formatting (5,00,000)
Frontend: All 10 loan types shown on onboarding step 1
Frontend: Dashboard shows 13 recommendations for personal loan profile
Frontend: Approval probability varies between banks with contextual reasons
Frontend: 'Change Preferences' button navigates to /onboarding
Frontend: Express Interest buttons present on recommendation cards
Frontend: Credit Builder tab shows 6 suggestions
Frontend: AI Advisor tab present with chat input, send button, voice button
Frontend: EMI Calculator tab works
Frontend: Profile editor button present
Frontend: Admin login → admin dashboard loads with analytics
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows stats cards, lead funnel chart, leads by bank chart, commission tracking, recent leads table
Frontend: Mobile responsiveness at 390px - all sections render correctly
Frontend: Scroll reveal animations - 9 sections with reveal-on-scroll class
Frontend: After login, user lands on landing page (not dashboard)
Frontend: Chatbot toggle button present at bottom right
critical_code_review_comments: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1) when container not visible - cosmetic issue, charts render correctly when visible. Consider adding minWidth/minHeight to chart containers.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user fulltest@r.com with car loan profile
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 completed comprehensive full-platform test. All 56 loan products across 10 categories verified. Auth uses HTTP-only cookies. Chatbot returns fallback (LLM budget exceeded - MOCKED). CIBIL/Experian credit score check is MOCKED (returns unavailable with provider links). Admin requires admin role. Approval probability varies by bank (public sector banks get +4 boost, premium products get -3). Indian number formatting works on onboarding inputs (5,00,000). Test user fulltest@r.com has completed car loan onboarding. All features working correctly.
